case_for: Ertz has shown he can hit ceiling weeks twice in the last four games (14.0 and 14.7 pts), suggesting his role can spike into red-zone or high-target usage that clears 12 points.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of just 1.5 points signals a major expected role reduction or injury/game-script concern that overrides his recent volatility, and his most recent outing was only 1.5 points.
